---
name: Clarification or improvement
about: Suggest a section that is unclear, an argument that needs strengthening, or an example that could be more precise
title: "[CLARIFICATION] "
labels: clarification
assignees: ''
---

**Location**
Which chapter, section, or pattern entry? Include the section heading or pattern name.

**Current content**
Quote or describe the passage that is unclear or could be improved.

**Suggested improvement**
What would make this clearer or stronger? If you have a specific rewrite in mind, include it here — but a description of the problem is sufficient to open the issue.

**Note**
Please read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) before submitting, particularly the style guidelines. Clarification suggestions that involve restructuring chapters or adding new pattern entries are outside the current scope.
